evidence_quality_note.detail: The current role apps and control-panel prove GET-based technical wiring only. Partner, field, captain, and operator mutation contracts are absent; 12 of 18 required state screenshots are also missing.

evidence_quality_note.v2_gap: REAL_EXPERIENCE_CLOSURE_v2 requires complete role experiences, not context-only read screens or a raw admin table. Missing write/auth/audit contracts and visual states block closure.
evidence_quality_note.escalation: BLOCKING — add all missing per-surface visual and runtime-state proof before DSH-001 can be closed.
